name: lattice-current
description: Signal workspace for live risk, markets, infrastructure, and replay-driven research.

scripts.build:full: node scripts/run-with-env.mjs VITE_VARIANT=full -- tsc && node scripts/run-with-env.mjs VITE_VARIANT=full -- vite build
scripts.build:tech: node scripts/run-with-env.mjs VITE_VARIANT=tech -- tsc && node scripts/run-with-env.mjs VITE_VARIANT=tech -- vite build
scripts.build:finance: node scripts/run-with-env.mjs VITE_VARIANT=finance -- tsc && node scripts/run-with-env.mjs VITE_VARIANT=finance -- vite build
scripts.build:happy: node scripts/run-with-env.mjs VITE_VARIANT=happy -- tsc && node scripts/run-with-env.mjs VITE_VARIANT=happy -- vite build
scripts.test:ci:core: node --import tsx --test tests/symbol-scoring.test.mjs tests/confirmation.test.mjs tests/event-candidates.test.mjs tests/meta-admission.test.mjs tests/signal-history-updater.test.mjs tests/persistent-cache-maintenance.test.mjs tests/idea-runtime-context.test.mjs tests/is1-orchestrator-wiring.test.mjs tests/auto-pipeline-dryrun.test.mjs tests/event-engine-schema.test.mjs tests/proposal-executor-guardrails.test.mjs
scripts.test:ci:data-integrity: node --import tsx --test tests/structured-logger.test.mjs tests/pipeline-logger.test.mjs tests/event-dashboard-metrics-route.test.mjs tests/event-dashboard-health-calibration.test.mjs tests/calibration-diagnostic.test.mjs tests/data-quality-check.test.mjs tests/schema-constraints.test.mjs tests/alert-notifier.test.mjs tests/master-daemon-guardrails.test.mjs tests/windows-spawn-guardrails.test.mjs tests/nas-runtime-config.test.mjs tests/runtime-observability.test.mjs tests/runtime-secrets-mirror-cache.test.mjs tests/local-runtime-observability-route.test.mjs
scripts.test:ci:coverage: node scripts/run-with-env.mjs NODE_V8_COVERAGE=.coverage -- node --experimental-test-coverage --import tsx --test tests/symbol-scoring.test.mjs tests/confirmation.test.mjs tests/event-candidates.test.mjs tests/meta-admission.test.mjs tests/signal-history-updater.test.mjs tests/persistent-cache-maintenance.test.mjs tests/idea-runtime-context.test.mjs tests/is1-orchestrator-wiring.test.mjs tests/auto-pipeline-dryrun.test.mjs tests/event-engine-schema.test.mjs tests/proposal-executor-guardrails.test.mjs tests/structured-logger.test.mjs tests/pipeline-logger.test.mjs tests/event-dashboard-metrics-route.test.mjs tests/event-dashboard-health-calibration.test.mjs tests/calibration-diagnostic.test.mjs tests/data-quality-check.test.mjs tests/schema-constraints.test.mjs tests/alert-notifier.test.mjs tests/master-daemon-guardrails.test.mjs tests/windows-spawn-guardrails.test.mjs tests/nas-runtime-config.test.mjs tests/runtime-observability.test.mjs tests/runtime-secrets-mirror-cache.test.mjs tests/local-runtime-observability-route.test.mjs
scripts.test:ci:signal-runtime: node --import tsx --test tests/idea-runtime-context.test.mjs tests/is1-orchestrator-wiring.test.mjs tests/runtime-analysis-bridge.test.mjs tests/signal-product-surface.test.mjs
scripts.test:ci:ops-observability: node --import tsx --test tests/fast-keyword-extractor.test.mjs tests/auto-pipeline.test.mjs tests/master-daemon-guardrails.test.mjs tests/windows-spawn-guardrails.test.mjs tests/nas-runtime-config.test.mjs tests/runtime-observability.test.mjs tests/runtime-secrets-mirror-cache.test.mjs tests/local-runtime-observability-route.test.mjs
scripts.test:e2e:runtime: node scripts/run-with-env.mjs VITE_VARIANT=full -- playwright test e2e/runtime-fetch.spec.ts
scripts.test:e2e: npm run test:e2e:runtime && npm run test:e2e:full && npm run test:e2e:tech && npm run test:e2e:finance
scripts.test:sidecar: node --test src-tauri/sidecar/local-api-server.test.mjs api/_cors.test.mjs api/youtube/embed.test.mjs api/cyber-threats.test.mjs api/usni-fleet.test.mjs scripts/ais-relay-rss.test.cjs api/loaders-xml-wms-regression.test.mjs
scripts.test:e2e:visual:full: node scripts/run-with-env.mjs VITE_VARIANT=full -- playwright test -g "matches golden screenshots per layer and zoom"
scripts.test:e2e:visual:tech: node scripts/run-with-env.mjs VITE_VARIANT=tech -- playwright test -g "matches golden screenshots per layer and zoom"
scripts.test:e2e:visual: npm run test:e2e:visual:full && npm run test:e2e:visual:tech
scripts.test:e2e:visual:update:full: node scripts/run-with-env.mjs VITE_VARIANT=full -- playwright test -g "matches golden screenshots per layer and zoom" --update-snapshots
scripts.test:e2e:visual:update:tech: node scripts/run-with-env.mjs VITE_VARIANT=tech -- playwright test -g "matches golden screenshots per layer and zoom" --update-snapshots
scripts.test:e2e:visual:update: npm run test:e2e:visual:update:full && npm run test:e2e:visual:update:tech
scripts.desktop:build:full: npm run version:sync && node scripts/run-with-env.mjs VITE_VARIANT=full VITE_DESKTOP_RUNTIME=1 -- tauri build
scripts.desktop:build:tech: npm run version:sync && node scripts/run-with-env.mjs VITE_VARIANT=tech VITE_DESKTOP_RUNTIME=1 -- tauri build --config src-tauri/tauri.tech.conf.json
scripts.desktop:build:finance: npm run version:sync && node scripts/run-with-env.mjs VITE_VARIANT=finance VITE_DESKTOP_RUNTIME=1 -- tauri build --config src-tauri/tauri.finance.conf.json
